- @james2021islr2e is a classic, highly accessible textbook on statistical learning.
An online version is available for free at <https://www.statlearning.com/>.

- [Stats Learning Notes](https://github.com/tdg5/stats-learning-notes)
provides comprehensive, chapter-by-chapter notes on
*An Introduction to Statistical Learning*.

- [ISLR Notes](https://github.com/eugene123tw/ISLR_notes)
is another set of study and reference notes for
*An Introduction to Statistical Learning*.

- [Introduction to Machine Learning](https://m-clark.github.io/introduction-to-machine-learning/)
is a beginner-friendly online textbook covering machine learning concepts.

- [ISLP Book Club](https://github.com/r4ds/bookclub-islp)
contains learning materials and resources from the book club covering
*An Introduction to Statistical Learning with Applications in Python*.

- [Data Science Learning Community (DSLC)](https://dslc.io/)
is a supportive community for learning data science,
which hosts book clubs and lists various learning resources.
